summary: Complete testing of Idle Forge mobile game UI redesign. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend features tested and working: no bottom tabs, 13 equipment slots, floating side buttons, forge with equip/sell choice, combat with auto mode, arena, inventory, and stats modal with forge upgrade.
critical_code_review_comments: AsyncStorage version mismatch warning in logs: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 installed but 2.2.0 expected. Consider updating package.json if compatibility issues arise.
Console warning about useNativeDriver not supported in web preview - this is expected for Expo web and won't affect native builds.
All testID attributes properly implemented for testing.
Equipment rarity colors working correctly (visible in screenshots).
Combat logs displaying correctly with color coding.
All modals properly implemented with close buttons.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for backend tests (status checks, game saves, leaderboard entries). All test data properly cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete UI redesign tested successfully. No bottom tabs, floating side buttons work perfectly. Forge costs 1 component and shows equip/sell modal. Combat system with auto mode works. All modals (Stages, Arena, Inventory, Stats) open and close properly. Backend APIs all functional. No issues found.

backend_tests.status_endpoints: ✓ Create and retrieve status checks working
backend_tests.game_save: ✓ Create, update, load, delete all working with persistence verification
backend_tests.leaderboard: ✓ Create, update, retrieve with sorting working
backend_tests.pvp_opponents: ✓ Generating opponents for all ranks (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond) with proper stat scaling

ui_structure.equipment_grid: ✓ 13 slots displayed in 5 rows as designed
ui_structure.side_buttons: ✓ STAGES (left), ARÈNE (right top), SAC (right bottom) all visible and positioned correctly
ui_structure.forge_section: ✓ At bottom with hammer animation and cost display (1 🔧)

forge_flow.forge_result_modal: ✓ Shows forged item with rarity color, stats, and power
forge_flow.equip_button: ✓ Equips item to correct slot with rarity border color
forge_flow.sell_button: ✓ Sells item and gives gold + soul dust (verified: gold increased from 0 to 76)

combat_system.auto_combat: ✓ AUTO button enables auto-attack, changes to STOP
combat_system.combat_logs: ✓ Display damage with color coding (player: green, monster: red)
combat_system.hp_bars: ✓ Update correctly for both player and monster

other_modals.inventory_modal: ✓ Opens showing 'SAC À DOS' with empty state message
other_modals.stats_modal: ✓ Opens on stats bar click, shows full character stats
other_modals.forge_upgrade: ✓ Visible in stats modal under AMÉLIORATIONS section (Forge Nv.2 upgrade button)
